scripts.install:all: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: client/node_modules/.bin/concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev" --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "green,blue"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm --prefix server run start:unified
scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.start:bun: npm run build && npm --prefix server run start:unified:bun
scripts.start:node: npm run build && npm --prefix server run start:unified:node
scripts.dev:bun: client/node_modules/.bin/concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev:bun" "npm --prefix client run dev" --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "green,blue"
scripts.dev:node: client/node_modules/.bin/concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev:node" "npm --prefix client run dev" --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "green,blue"
scripts.services:science: docker compose --profile science up -d gromacs-api glioblastoma-predictor
